subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-11-17
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! His divine help and assistance have enveloped us and the confirmations of the Abha Kingdom have surrounded us.... Had there not been this servitude, constancy and confirmation
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله عون و عنایت مبارک از جمیع جهات رسید و تأیید ملکوت ابهی احاطه نمود امر الله گوشزد عموم گردید
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @growth of the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
